checks.name: static_temporal_separation
checks.detail: STATIC (topology + propagation + qualification + signal activation) cleanly separated from TEMPORAL (posture drift, run-over-run, execution dynamics). No temporal claims in Tier 1A/1B.

checks.name: demo_capability_verification
checks.detail: All 12 capabilities used in demo choreography (§14) verified as CANONICAL_RUNTIME_ACTIVE. No hypothetical or aspirational capabilities in the 20-minute demo.

checks.name: commercial_anti_patterns_enforced

checks.name: frozen_identity_compliance
